title: agentscope-agui-scaffold — a native AgentScope 2.0 + AG-UI + assistant-ui starter, runs in 3 minutes with no model key
body:
Hi AgentScope community,

I've been building on the new `AGUIProtocolMiddleware` and wanted to share a minimal scaffold I put together: **agentscope-agui-scaffold**.

## Why

Wiring a native AgentScop…
